---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or a new piano-model integration
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the problem or use case.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to happen.

**Piano model (if applicable)**
If this is about supporting another piano model, list the model and any protocol notes you have.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative approaches you thought about.

**Additional context**
Anything else relevant.
